requirement_topic.en: GEMS Energy Labelling — Zoned Energy Rating Label
requirement_topic.zh: GEMS能效标签——分区能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: GEMS能效標籤——分區能效標籤

summary.en: The mandatory labelling obligation for covered air conditioners and air-to-air heat pumps comes from the GEMS Act and the applicable GEMS determination. Since 1 April 2020, most newly registered air conditioners use the Zoned Energy Rating Label. The label reports heating and cooling performance by Australian climate zone and is generated from GEMS registration data. AS/NZS 3823 seasonal-performance methods support the label calculations for air conditioners and heat pumps.
summary.zh: 覆盖范围内空调和空气-空气热泵的强制标签义务来自GEMS法和适用GEMS裁定。自2020年4月1日起，多数新注册空调使用分区能效标签。该标签按澳大利亚气候区显示制热和制冷性能，并由GEMS注册数据生成。AS/NZS 3823季节性能方法支持空调和热泵标签计算。
summary.zht: 涵蓋範圍內空調和空氣-空氣熱泵的強制標籤義務來自GEMS法和適用GEMS裁定。自2020年4月1日起，多數新註冊空調使用分區能效標籤。該標籤按澳洲氣候區顯示制熱和制冷性能，並由GEMS註冊資料生成。AS/NZS 3823季節性能方法支持空調和熱泵標籤計算。

standards_or_laws: Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards Act 2012
Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (Air Conditioners up to 65kW) Determination 2019

summary.en: China energy labels and GB 21455 ratings use Chinese climate assumptions, rating classes, QR-code label rules, and performance declarations. They do not generate the Australian Zoned Energy Rating Label and do not show the hot, average, and cold climate-zone figures required for Australian point-of-sale communication.
summary.zh: 中国能效标识和GB 21455评级采用中国气候假设、能效等级、二维码标签规则和性能声明。其不能生成澳大利亚分区能效标签，也不显示澳大利亚销售环节所需的炎热、平均和寒冷气候区数据。
summary.zht: 中國能效標識和GB 21455評級採用中國氣候假設、能效等級、二維碼標籤規則和性能聲明。其不能生成澳洲分區能效標籤，也不顯示澳洲銷售環節所需的炎熱、平均和寒冷氣候區資料。

gap.en: Product artwork, packaging, online listings, and sales literature must use Australian GEMS label data where the label is required or voluntarily displayed. Chinese star ratings or seasonal efficiency classes should not be reused as Australian label claims.
gap.zh: 在要求或自愿展示澳大利亚标签时，产品图稿、包装、线上页面和销售资料必须使用澳大利亚GEMS标签数据。中国星级或季节能效等级不应作为澳大利亚标签声明重复使用。
gap.zht: 在要求或自願展示澳洲標籤時，產品圖稿、包裝、線上頁面和銷售資料必須使用澳洲GEMS標籤資料。中國星級或季節能效等級不應作為澳洲標籤聲明重複使用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the GEMS determination requires label display; AS/NZS 3823 supports calculation but the legal obligation is the GEMS framework
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic energy label where in scope

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — Australian label data and display rules must be produced from GEMS registration; China labels cannot be carried over.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——澳大利亚标签数据和展示规则必须由GEMS注册生成；中国标签不能沿用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——澳洲標籤資料和展示規則必須由GEMS註冊生成；中國標籤不能沿用。

requirement_topic.en: Heat Pump Water Heaters — AS/NZS 4234 Evidence Check

summary.en: For air-source heat pump water heaters, Australian energy programs may request AS/NZS 4234 performance evidence for solar and heat pump water-heater calculations, but Energy Rating consumer guidance states that solar, heat pump, and electric instantaneous water heaters do not have GEMS energy efficiency requirements. If the exported product is a space-conditioning air-to-air heat pump, AS/NZS 3823 is the relevant GEMS test framework; if it is a heat pump water heater, confirm whether state schemes, rebates, or plumbing rules require AS/NZS 4234 evidence.
summary.zh: 对于空气源热泵热水器，澳大利亚能源项目可能要求AS/NZS 4234性能证据用于太阳能和热泵热水器计算，但Energy Rating消费者指南说明，太阳能、热泵和即热式电热水器没有GEMS能效要求。若出口产品为空气-空气空间调温热泵，AS/NZS 3823是相关GEMS测试框架；若为热泵热水器，应确认州计划、补贴或给排水规则是否要求AS/NZS 4234证据。
summary.zht: 對於空氣源熱泵熱水器，澳洲能源項目可能要求AS/NZS 4234性能證據用於太陽能和熱泵熱水器計算，但Energy Rating消費者指南說明，太陽能、熱泵和即熱式電熱水器沒有GEMS能效要求。若出口產品為空氣-空氣空間調溫熱泵，AS/NZS 3823是相關GEMS測試框架；若為熱泵熱水器，應確認州計畫、補貼或給排水規則是否要求AS/NZS 4234證據。

standards_or_laws: Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards Act 2012
Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (Air Conditioners up to 65kW) Determination 2019

summary.en: Chinese heat pump water-heater evidence may rely on GB/T 23137, GB 29541, or domestic energy-efficiency reports. Those records do not automatically satisfy Australian AS/NZS 4234 calculations or any state incentive-listing requirements.
summary.zh: 中国热泵热水器证据可能依据GB/T 23137、GB 29541或国内能效报告。这些记录不会自动满足澳大利亚AS/NZS 4234计算或任何州级激励清单要求。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵熱水器證據可能依據GB/T 23137、GB 29541或國內能效報告。這些記錄不會自動滿足澳洲AS/NZS 4234計算或任何州級激勵清單要求。

gap.en: Classify the product first. Space-conditioning air-source heat pumps and heat pump water heaters follow different Australian evidence paths; AS/NZS 4234 should not be substituted for AS/NZS 3823 in the GEMS air-conditioner determination.
gap.zh: 应先进行产品分类。空间调温空气源热泵和热泵热水器在澳大利亚采用不同证据路径；不得以AS/NZS 4234替代GEMS空调裁定中的AS/NZS 3823。
gap.zht: 應先進行產品分類。空間調溫空氣源熱泵和熱泵熱水器在澳洲採用不同證據路徑；不得以AS/NZS 4234替代GEMS空調裁定中的AS/NZS 3823。

mandatory_status.target: Product-dependent: GEMS is mandatory for covered air conditioners; AS/NZS 4234 may be required by non-GEMS programs for heat pump water heaters
mandatory_status.cn: Product-dependent under Chinese water-heater and energy-efficiency rules

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Classification gap — AS/NZS 3823 is central for covered air-to-air heat pumps; AS/NZS 4234 is relevant when the product is a heat pump water heater or a state program asks for that evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 分类差距——AS/NZS 3823是覆盖范围内空气-空气热泵的核心；AS/NZS 4234在产品为热泵热水器或州项目要求该证据时相关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 分類差距——AS/NZS 3823是涵蓋範圍內空氣-空氣熱泵的核心；AS/NZS 4234在產品為熱泵熱水器或州項目要求該證據時相關。
